US-001.given: the Dikta Windows project is cloned and .NET 8 SDK is installed
US-001.when: dotnet build is run from the project root
US-001.then: the build succeeds with no errors and produces a DiktaWindows.exe

US-001.given: the built app is launched on Windows 11
US-001.when: the user looks at the taskbar notification area
US-001.then: a Dikta tray icon is visible, no main window appears, and right-clicking shows a menu with Settings, History, and Quit

US-001.given: the app is running in the system tray
US-001.when: the user right-clicks the icon and selects Quit
US-001.then: the app exits and the tray icon disappears

US-002.given: the app is running and idle
US-002.when: the user presses Ctrl+Shift+D from any application
US-002.then: the tray icon changes to indicate recording and a start sound plays
recording stops, a stop sound plays, and the tray icon returns to idle state

US-002.given: the app recorded a 5-second audio clip
US-002.then: a temporary WAV file exists with 16kHz mono PCM data suitable for Whisper processing

US-003.given: the user has just dictated 'Hello world this is a test' and stopped recording
US-003.then: the transcribed text appears pasted at the cursor position in the previously active application

US-003.given: the app is launched for the first time and no Whisper model exists in %APPDATA%\Dikta\models\
US-003.then: a dialog appears explaining that the Whisper model needs to be downloaded before first use

US-003.given: the app is running with airplane mode enabled (no network)
US-003.when: the user records and transcribes a clip
US-003.then: transcription succeeds using the local model with no network errors

US-003.given: the user dictates a 30-second clip on a modern x64 machine
US-003.then: the result is returned in under 5 seconds

US-004.given: the user opens Settings from the tray menu
US-004.when: they click the hotkey field and press Ctrl+Alt+R
US-004.then: the new hotkey is captured, displayed in the field, and works globally after saving

US-004.given: the user changes the language to Swedish in Settings and restarts the app
US-004.then: transcription produces Swedish text and the language setting persists

US-004.given: the user has dictated 3 different texts in the current session
US-004.when: they open the History submenu from the tray icon
US-004.then: all 3 transcriptions appear as entries; clicking one copies its full text to the clipboard

US-004.given: the app is launched on a machine where microphone privacy is disabled for desktop apps
US-004.then: a dialog appears explaining that microphone access is needed and how to enable it in Windows Settings > Privacy > Microphone

US-004.given: the user has 10+ transcriptions in history and restarts the app
US-004.then: the last 10 entries are shown, confirming history persists across restarts
